notableEvents.label: Sal Stewart GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Blake Dunn out at 2nd. Sal Stewart out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday GIDP
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson. Spencer Steer out at 2nd. JJ Bleday out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
